name: webpilot-server-for-chrome-extension
description: MCP server for browser control via Chrome extension

scripts.build: echo Use build:win, build:mac, or build:linux && exit 1
scripts.build:win: npm run build:web-ui && pkg . --target node18-win-x64 --out-path dist
scripts.build:mac: npm run build:web-ui && pkg . --target node18-macos-x64 --out-path dist
scripts.build:linux: npm run build:web-ui && pkg . --target node18-linux-x64 --out-path dist

pkg._comment_native_modules: TODO (P2 phase 7): better-sqlite3 has a native binding (build/Release/better_sqlite3.node). @yao-pkg/pkg cannot bundle native .node files into the snapshot — they must be shipped as loose files next to the pkg-built .exe. At pkg time we will need to (a) copy node_modules/better-sqlite3/build/Release/better_sqlite3.node into the dist/ output and (b) either set the BETTER_SQLITE3_BINARY env var or add a `bin` entry to pkg.targets so the binary is loaded from disk at runtime. Confirm on a fresh Windows VM before Phase 7 closes.
